thinking.text: The tool has been given to the user. Now I need to explain how to use it. The tool takes `user_id` and `transaction_id` as parameters. Let me tell the user how to call it for each transaction.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:

You'll need to call it **three times**, once for each transaction, using your user ID (`d2e5bc4124`) and the respective transaction ID.

| # | Transaction | How to call it |
|---|---|---|
| 1️⃣ | **WeWork** — $380.61 | `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="d2e5bc4124", transaction_id="txn_fa793baabcf4")` |
| 2️⃣ | **Chipotle** — $369.55 | `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="d2e5bc4124", transaction_id="txn_ccbb948ffa10")` |
| 3️⃣ | **Everlane** — $270.42 | `submit_cash_back_dispute_0589(user_id="d2e5bc4124", transaction_id="txn_5b30a52ac9d6")` |

Just call `call_discoverable_user_tool` with those details for each one. Once you've submitted them, our team will review the disputes and if approved, the correct rewards will be applied to your account. Let me know if you have any questions!
